name: DOM XSS via innerHTML assignment with user-controlled input
notes: The diff assigns `el.innerHTML = comment.body` via a React ref callback. Primary rule is R-02 (innerHTML sink). R-01 (dangerouslySetInnerHTML) is accepted as an alternative because the underlying CWE (CWE-79) and OWASP category (A03) are identical; LLMs commonly conflate the two React XSS sinks.
